productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Shirt
description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryTrust united colors of benetton to nail the minimalistic mood of the moment in their casual wear for men. With its timeless check patterning and luxe fabric, this shirt looks good styled with a simple pair of denims or under a structured blazer for a layered look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
